title: A Yellow Artists Collaborative Piece
description: Yellow Is Everywhere is a collaborative zine by four Yellow artists, bringing a poem about everyday optimism into illustrated form and distributing it across public spaces in Makati City and Quezon City.
details: Yellow Is Everywhere is a collaborative zine project inspired by a poem from Kimmydeuk that invites people to notice the small, bright moments of yellow that appear in everyday life. The zine will feature four Yellow artists, Kimmydeuk, Duckhead, Nadiecito, and Pip, with each artist interpreting one stanza of the poem across two pages in their own visual style. Produced as a limited-edition 4×4 inch printed artifact with a cc0 digital version, the project is designed to inspire optimism, showcase the range of talent within Yellow Collective, and bring Nounish creativity into real-world community spaces. Copies will be distributed across Makati City and Quezon City through a yellow booth at Car-Free Sunday, public library donations, placements in local coffee shops, and a wellness-focused live talk seminar, with photo and video documentation shared afterward on Farcaster and X.
